buyback.execution_style_reason: Most observed direct buy volume is executed via multi-trade fragmented sessions.
buyback.observability_note: Directly observable buyback legs are concentrated in July 2025. Later buybacks are likely under-counted in direct execution data and need treasury / Squads-side reconciliation.

whale_proxy_rollup.note: Whale flow is proxy-only and derived from daily balance changes among the 59-holder sample. It is not equivalent to confirmed exchange selling.

cost_basis.note: Whale entry prices are estimated from first visible balance appearance in the 59-holder history and daily close prices. They are rough anchors, not realized-cost reconstructions.

event_windows.interpretation: Window was driven more by holder rebalancing than by confirmed official flow.

official_entities.label: PUMP Team/Investor Squads Vault #4 (SELLING → OKX)
official_entities.note: Received 18.75B PUMP from Token Custodian on 2025-07-14. CONFIRMED: 3.125B distributed as 2×1.5625B to OKX on 2025-10-06 via pass-through FfGLiWhCDH3FqQho5hMopReTmYAwXArJtJ23wKxrG47A (17 txs, same-day, Squads V4 execution pattern). Current balance: 15.625B.

official_entities.label: PUMP Team/Investor Squads Vault #5 Wallet A (ACTIVE SELLING)
official_entities.note: Received 18.75B PUMP from Token Custodian on 2025-07-14. CONFIRMED: ALL outflows went to Bitget. Sep 2025: 4.6875B → pass-through 3K9vhQSaRtkoZbvj5bzRdqdYZLRmG2Cj9qN5sVFjmVru → DNuUdE9on7cVcnZ9DGN89pfmd23DeBFYWupyUjeK7QGp → Bitget. Mar 2026: 7.172B → Bitget via 3 more pass-throughs. TOTAL to Bitget: ~11.859B. Current balance: 6.891B.

official_entities.label: PUMP Investor Wallet #1 (CONFIRMED)
official_entities.note: Received 20B PUMP from Token Custodian on 2025-07-14. Deposited 11.2B PUMP ($21.22M) to Kraken on 2026-02-26. Estimated ~8.8B remaining.

official_entities.label: Pump.fun Team Wallet #1 (CONFIRMED)
official_entities.note: Received 3.75B PUMP from Token Custodian on 2025-07-14. Held for 7 months. Distributed entire 3.75B over Feb 16-21, 2026 in small amounts (~12-14M per tx) to 10+ wallet addresses. Main recipient: Wintermute (0.94B, market maker). Other 2.8B distributed across 9+ wallets. 0 PUMP balance remaining. No direct CEX deposits detected. Likely a grant program, liquidity mining rewards, or market maker compensation pool.

official_entities.label: Official Allocation Multisig #2
official_entities.note: Received exactly 20B PUMP from Token Custodian (Cfq1ts1...) on 2025-07-14 — same batch as Team Wallet #1 and Investor Wallet #1. Multisig wallet (isOnCurve=False, Squads-style). CONFIRMED: 0.869B distributed as staking/ecosystem rewards — NOT selling. Flow: Multisig → 7Qao1Sqh1 (0.796B) → HaYTWK3n (rewards hub, 826 txs) → distributed to ~80+ small wallets in 0.001-0.033B amounts (Oct-Nov 2025). Also → 8S3BjPnAy (0.073B + additional from 7Qao1Sqh1) → rolling monthly micro-distributions to multiple wallets. Zero CEX deposits confirmed. Likely Foundation or Community Ecosystem rewards allocation.

official_sell_ledger.label: Official Allocation Multisig #2

whale_clusters.label: Hyperunit: Hot Wallet
whale_clusters.note: DeFi protocol hot wallet (Hyperunit). Publicly labeled on Solscan. Holds 10.5B PUMP + 299K SOL (M) + 108M Fartcoin. Very active (1000+ txs/3 days). Likely market maker or liquidity provider holding PUMP inventory. Minimal PUMP outflow (4.82% sell rate).

confidence_tiers: Tier 1: confirmed on-chain official pressure from structured address tracing and signature-level buyback verification.
Tier 2: treasury / milestone reconciliation from prior research outputs.
Tier 3: whale proxy flows from daily balance changes in the 59-holder sample.
limitations: Later buybacks are likely under-counted in direct execution data because routing may occur through Squads internals or other program-controlled accounts.
Whale flows are proxy signals from balance deltas, not direct exchange-transfer proof.
Current price comparisons do not prove realized PnL; they only frame pressure relative to observed or estimated cost anchors.
The 59-holder sample captures large-address behavior, not the full free float.

coverage_flags: Direct buyback observability is strong in July 2025 and weaker afterward.
Official vault / investor sell events are structured and confirmed for the main pressure addresses.
59-holder whale history covers balance behavior but not direct exchange attribution.
known_conflicts: Investor Wallet #1 is not marked as to_cex in pump_team_analysis.json but is confirmed as 11.2B -> Kraken in pump_addresses.json, pump_whale_analysis.json, and PUMP_Phase1_Report.md.
limitations: Later buybacks are likely under-counted in direct execution data because routing may occur through Squads internals or other program-controlled accounts.
Whale flows are proxy signals from balance deltas, not direct exchange-transfer proof.
Current price comparisons do not prove realized PnL; they only frame pressure relative to observed or estimated cost anchors.
The 59-holder sample captures large-address behavior, not the full free float.

summary.headline: Buyback existed and was large in cumulative terms, but price support was diluted by confirmed official token releases into exchanges and market-making / DEX routes, while 59-holder proxy flows did not show a synchronized whale exit in the March 2026 sell windows.
key_takeaways: Confirmed official CEX pressure reached 26.184B PUMP, about 26.75% of the conservative claimed buyback token volume.
Including Wintermute / DEX-style official release, confirmed market-facing official pressure reached 29.387B PUMP.
In the major March 2026 sell windows, the 59-holder sample was mostly net accumulating rather than synchronously net distributing.
Current price is -47.25% below the claimed cumulative buyback average price and -72.85% below the observable July direct-buy average price.
